stories.title: Chef Marco Tribute
stories.text: A culinary team converted years of gratitude into a desk-ready keepsake with a chef coat, copper pan, and signed base.

stories.title: Dr. Ananya Celebration
stories.text: A family celebrated a medical milestone with a stethoscope motif, pastel palette, and tiny handwritten message.

stories.title: Rohan Sports Edition
stories.text: An action-pose figurine styled with team colors, sneaker details, and a match-date marker.

stories.title: First Dance Keepsake
stories.text: A wedding memory became a timeless couple collectible with coordinated outfits and an engraved plinth.
